name: Vikkatakavi
overview: In the 1970s, the people of Amaragiri are devastated by a plague that causes memory loss. A detective, Rama Krishna, arrives to investigate the case. Will he find the cause or fall prey to the curse?

trailers.title: Vikkatakavi Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Naresh Agastya | Megha Akash | SRT Ent | 28th Nov
